boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?

boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-EHS-004 timestamp (2026-06-17 09:05) is before QUEUE-EHS-004 scheduled release (2026-06-17 10:30) and matches account ACCT-EHS-004, source OBJ-EHS-004, scope 004, but fails on release condition exactness.

final_answer: Action may not proceed due to an exact match failure on the release condition. The dependency closure DEP-EHS-004 records release condition RC-EHS-004-S while the request REQ-EHS-004 specifies RC-EHS-004. Per MATCH-EHS-004, the closure must exactly match the requested object, scope, release condition, account, and before-release timestamp. The mismatch on release condition blocks closure despite correct timestamps, account, and scope alignment. The source boundary remains open, requiring defect repair before any release can occur.
